description:
The RectMesh component takes in a value (either a dynamic value from an IAudioSource, or a min and max float value) and parameters for the generated rect mesh, then renders it onto the UIX.

}}

fields.Mesh: The mesh parameters used to render this rect mesh.
fields.Materials: The material to render for this rect mesh.

usage: This can be used to make fancy audio visuals from a user's Audio Stream Controller.
